title: Gannt - Group by item in connected boards
excerpt: It would be really nice to be able to group by Items from connected boards in gannt-diagram. Let’s say you have set up teams in another board and tasks in your board, and want to see a specific gannt for the teams you ha…

posts.author: rolf (Rolf-Ørjan)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be really nice to be able to group by Items from connected boards in gannt-diagram. Let’s say you have set up teams in another board and tasks in your board, and want to see a specific gannt for the teams you have selected for the tasks in your project…
